'''zonalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pickled|pickled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pickled|pickled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zonalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || zonalithi || zonaliji || zonalishi || zonaliki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || zonaluthu || zonaluju || zonalushu || zonaluku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || zonaluthu || zonaluju || zonalushu || zonaluku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || zonalufthuf || zonalufjuf || zonalufshuf || zonalufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || zonalethe || zonaleje || zonaleshe || zonaleke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || zonalotho || zonalojo || zonalosho || zonaloko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || zonalotho || zonalojo || zonalosho || zonaloko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || zonalofthof || zonalofjof || zonalofshof || zonalofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zonalïfthïf || zonalïfjïf || zonalïfshïf || zonalïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zonalïfthïf || zonalïfjïf || zonalïfshïf || zonalïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zonalïfthïf || zonalïfjïf || zonalïfshïf || zonalïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zonalïfthïf || zonalïfjïf || zonalïfshïf || zonalïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || zonalæthæ || zonalæjæ || zonalæshæ || zonalækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || zonalatha || zonalaja || zonalasha || zonalaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || zonalatha || zonalaja || zonalasha || zonalaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || zonalafthaf || zonalafjaf || zonalafshaf || zonalafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || zonalasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || zonalshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || zonalroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || zonalmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || zonalyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozonalnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozonalnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozonalnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozonalnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || zonanalasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || zonanalshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || zonanalroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || zonanalmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || zonanalyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozonanalnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozonanalnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozonanalnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozonanalnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || zenælasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || zenælshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || zenælroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || zenælmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || zenælyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozenælnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozenælnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozenælnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozenælnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || zonfalasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || zonfalshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || zonfalroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || zonfalmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || zonfalyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozonfalnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozonfalnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozonfalnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozonfalnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
